entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop whose germplasm collection was analyzed for diversity across various traits and regions

entities.name: QUALITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Discrete characteristics of pigeonpea, including growth habit, stem colour, flowering pattern, and flower/seed colour

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Measurable characteristics of pigeonpea, including growth duration, height, number of branches, seed size, and yield

entities.name: SEMI-SPREADING GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A qualitative growth habit predominant in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: GREEN STEM COLOUR
entities.description: A qualitative stem colour trait predominant in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: INDETERMINATE FLOWERING PATTERN
entities.description: A qualitative flowering pattern predominant in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: YELLOW FLOWER COLOUR
entities.description: A qualitative flower colour trait predominant in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: PRIMARY SEED COLOUR
entities.description: A qualitative trait showing maximum variability in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: ORANGE SEED COLOUR
entities.description: One of the most frequent seed colours observed in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: CREAM SEED COLOUR
entities.description: One of the most frequent seed colours observed in the pigeonpea collection

entities.name: GROWTH DURATION
entities.description: A quantitative trait that varied by region, being short in Oceania and longer in Africa

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A quantitative trait that varied by region, being short in Oceania and taller in Africa

entities.name: NUMBER OF BRANCHES
entities.description: A quantitative trait that was lower in accessions from Oceania

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: A quantitative trait that was lower in Oceania and higher in Africa

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: A quantitative trait that was smaller in Oceania and larger in Africa

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: A quantitative trait that was lower in accessions from Oceania

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A method used to measure the pooled germplasm diversity across traits

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group pigeonpea accessions based on principal component scores

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to reduce the dimensionality of 12 quantitative traits for cluster analysis

entities.name: OCEANIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea accessions were characterized by short duration, short height, and lower yields

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea accessions were characterized by longer duration, taller height, and larger seeds

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country whose accessions were grouped into cluster 2 during cluster analysis

entities.name: INDONESIA
entities.description: A country whose accessions were grouped into cluster 3 during cluster analysis

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: A country whose accessions were grouped into cluster 3 during cluster analysis

entities.name: PHILIPPINES
entities.description: A country whose accessions were grouped into cluster 3 during cluster analysis

entities.name: EUROPE
entities.description: A region whose accessions were grouped into cluster 3 during cluster analysis

entities.name: AMERICA
entities.description: A region whose accessions were grouped into cluster 3 during cluster analysis

entities.name: CARIBBEAN
entities.description: A region whose accessions were grouped into cluster 3 during cluster analysis

entities.name: MYANMAR
entities.description: A pigeonpea-rich country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A pigeonpea-rich country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: BAHAMAS
entities.description: A country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: BURUNDI
entities.description: A country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: COMOROS
entities.description: A country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: HAITI
entities.description: A country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: PANAMA
entities.description: A country that is underrepresented in the germplasm collection

entities.name: GERMPLASM EXPLORATION
entities.description: The process of collecting and documenting genetic resources from underrepresented regions
